ab: awlit ga isi ki ta’uya su marahan ta’atum, pakuhiy ga isi ki talangan su tiri awlu, ya’ani ku ini patakari.
ch: M:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: aw sawun kaniy, niya mu takariyun la, misa su mutu kung ini tiri.
ch: W:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了，難怪我都抓不到。

ab: nanu u pasaba’ay misu sazing taya’an ru sawun nanu pawsa su ta’uya.
ch: M:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: aw ru! ya’asa balay! ya’ani la ga suru niya musa kung tiri su sinuw uziy la.
ch: W:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: ruyux ku ka’aman sala la, haliy magan ki kahu na sawki, hala ta i sala.
ch: M:田裡的草太長了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: ki siyun inu ku sawki?
ch: W:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: ki siyaw na kahu ku luku  , mayup su kahu laga taxan su la.
ch: M:在圓簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: pinbaga magan, laxiy agan pangih, hingu ku sawki.
ch: M:小心拿，不要受傷，鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: laxiy i pa’aliy ku ta’uya mu ki!
ch: M:不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: ki inu ku ta’uya su?
ch: W:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: ki i yahu na kahawni hasa ku ta’uya mu.
ch: M:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: huwa su ba’un lmngalung?
ch: W:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: niyan mu siyun su turing, ku runi , ba’un mu kiy inu ku ta’uya mu.
ch: M:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: hani ga saguyu, saguyu miyan siyux i siyaw na gawng.
ch: W:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: ungat ku saguyu miyan hasa hiya, mutu sami isi panayp magan siyux.
ch: M:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: ayat kung nabing su bawli nayp na, pasaba’iy kung sautux aw?
ch: W:我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: aw yu ! pagaluw ta sa’utux musa panayp
ch: M:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: nanu u pasaba’ay misu tamuni su saguyu sa’utux.
ch: W:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: niya maha tari tari ku nayp su la, ini ka niya tiri su siyux, haziy i haliy pasakalu.
ch: W:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了，你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: na tikay, maylay sa’ayung ku asu, niya kung ti hani pasakaluw nayp, haliy kung ramaw magan su tahung aras runi . aw
ch: M:等等，船太晃了，我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: sakalagiy isu ku siyux pakura ki kuzing, ragay misu pasakalu.
ch: W:你把魚拉到我這邊，我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: tiya kinbalay! payux ku anagan ta  , sapun siyax kwara ku yawa la.
ch: M:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: tila la, halay ta amasu kwara galuw ta.
ch: W:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
